auth.title: Sign in with phone

subtitle.phone: Enter your phone number to continue
subtitle.otp: Enter the code we sent to your phone

phone.label: Phone number
phone.hint: We'll text you a one-time verification code

errors.pattern: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number

success.title: Authentication successful
success.message: Connecting you to the Ampairs app…
success.deepLinkHelp: If the app didn't open automatically, use the button above or copy your tokens below.
success.tokensHint: Copy this and paste it into the app

messages.otpSendFailed: Couldn't send the code. Please try again.
messages.tokensCopied: Tokens copied. Paste them into the app.
messages.copyFailed: Couldn't copy. Please select and copy manually.

firebaseErrors.invalidPhone: Invalid phone number. Please check and try again.
firebaseErrors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
firebaseErrors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
firebaseErrors.codeExpired: The code has expired. Please request a new one.
firebaseErrors.captchaFailed: reCAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
firebaseErrors.recaptchaInit: Couldn't initialise reCAPTCHA. Please reload the page.
firebaseErrors.generic: Something went wrong during authentication. Please try again.

auth.footer: Secured by Firebase. Your information is encrypted and protected.
